prompt: A cinematic street-food advertisement poster for WOW! momo, shot at night on a rain-slick urban street with warm neon bokeh and a dramatic food-photography look. The composition is square and poster-like, with a black textured background overlaid by faint repeating words such as STEAM, SIZZLE, REPEAT, and SPICE. At the top left, place a bold white-and-red WOW! momo logo. Dominating the center, huge distressed block letters read BITE THE FIRE in tall off-white typography. Below and to the left of the headline, smaller stacked text reads STREET HEAT. FULL POWER.. Show 4 momos in total: 3 whole pan-fried momos flying above a black skillet and 1 cut-open momo at the center top, revealing a richly textured filling. The cut-open momo erupts with glossy red chili sauce splashing outward in midair, with droplets frozen around it. The 3 whole momos are golden-brown, pleated, blistered, and slightly charred, coated with oil and spice, arranged dynamically above the pan as if tossed upward by heat and motion. The skillet sits in the lower center foreground, filled with sizzling chili oil, sauce, and scattered seasoning, with a metal spatula entering from the right side. Add sparks, steam, oil droplets, and a burst of sauce at pan level for high-energy action. Flames rise beneath the pan at the very bottom edge. In the lower left foreground, show an open takeout box branded with the same logo, containing 4 pale steamed momos, beside a small black dipping bowl of red sauce. In the right background, include a vertical glowing red neon sign reading MOMO. Along the left border, add a slim vertical red text strip reading STREET HEAT • SPICY • FRESH. Along the bottom border, include small footer text: STEAMED & PAN-FRIED MOMOS • SIGNATURE SPICE • 2026 EDITION and the website wowmomo.com. Style: hyper-realistic commercial food photography mixed with action poster design, dramatic contrast, fiery orange-red highlights, deep blacks, wet reflections, crisp textures, shallow depth of field, suspended motion, appetizing glaze, premium fast-food campaign aesthetic.
